backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (welcome landing page, app navigation flow update, and design theme) to their corresponding source files and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, context, and configuration file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark modes covering background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React app titled 'SmartCampus Connect' that mounts the app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component managing a four-state navigation flow (welcome → role selection → login → dashboard) with role-based tab routing, AuthContext integration, and logout handling.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar that displays only the tab matching the authenticated user's role, includes a theme toggle, role badge, and a logout button.
frontend/src/components/RoleLoginPage.ts: Two-panel role-specific login page with a branded left panel and a credentials form on the right, supporting both form submission and a quick-enter bypass with a simulated loading delay.
frontend/src/components/RoleSelectionLan: Renders a landing page where users select their role (Student, Teacher, Institute, or Parent), displaying styled role cards with icons, descriptions, and accent colors that trigger an `onSelectRole` callback.
frontend/src/components/tabs/AcademicRoa: Shows a semester-by-semester academic roadmap with subject progress, status badges, and teacher contact info, filterable by branch and semester via dropdowns.
frontend/src/components/tabs/AntiTrapFee: Provides a community-driven report board where students can view, upvote, and comment on verified or warning-flagged company/internship reports, and submit new reports with proof uploads.
frontend/src/components/tabs/Competitive: Displays a hub for competitive exam preparation showing student profiles filterable by exam type (GATE, CAT, GRE, etc.), existing study groups, and a panel to create a new exam profile.
frontend/src/components/tabs/faculty-hub: Faculty academic control panel with forms for uploading syllabi, entering student marks, scheduling exams, creating quizzes/tasks, and sending notifications to students.
Faculty AI assistant panel that provides lecture summarization, auto question generation, at-risk student identification, and performance prediction with trend indicators using mock data.
Displays curriculum coverage progress across branches and divisions using progress bars, a topic timeline, overdue topic alerts, and a weekly teaching activity heatmap.

Displays a faculty leaderboard and performance cards with department filtering, showing metrics like teaching score, research count, and feedback rating. Includes expandable improvement suggestions and a ranked top-performers list.

Renders a grid of external tool integrations (Google Classroom, GitHub, LinkedIn, Smartboard, Report Generator) with connection status badges and interactive action buttons that simulate connecting or syncing.

Provides a smartboard teaching session interface where faculty can select branch, division, and subject, then start/stop a class with recording, track topic completion progress, and toggle auto-upload.

Shows a filterable student performance dashboard with metrics for attendance, assignments, participation, achievements, and hackathons, including a mini SVG skill-growth sparkline and an attendance distribution bar chart.
frontend/src/components/tabs/FacultyInte: Top-level tab component for the Faculty Intelligence Hub that renders a header with branding and a sub-navigation bar, switching between seven sub-sections (Smartboard, Tracking, Performance, Networking, Integrations, Control, AI Assistant) based on active state.
frontend/src/components/tabs/institute-c: A sticky bottom panel displaying campus governance metrics (satisfaction, sustainability, alerts) with a circular smart-campus score meter and an SVG trend line chart, collapsible via a toggle bar.

Displays a faculty performance dashboard with scoring metrics, weak faculty identification, training recommendations, and HOD performance data, including confirmation dialogs for actions like issuing training notices or termination.

Renders an infrastructure and placement control panel showing facility gaps, lab comparisons, smartboard usage, tech upgrade statuses, modernization progress, company engagement, salary trends, placement by branch, and recruiter feedback.

Presents institute-wide performance analytics including KPI cards, branch and division scores, teacher rankings, weak student data, attendance trends, benchmarking against IITs/NITs, and prioritized improvement recommendations.

Shows student growth metrics including weak student lists, improvement plans, skill gap analysis, certifications, competitive exam stats, mentorship data, and placement readiness distribution across the student body.
frontend/src/components/tabs/InstituteCo: Top-level tab component for the Institute Intelligence Command Center that provides a themed header and sub-navigation for four sections: Performance Analytics, Faculty & Staff Optimization, Student Growth, and Infrastructure & Placement.
frontend/src/components/tabs/parent-insi: Provides a parent-facing view of faculty profiles with qualifications, engagement scores, syllabus completion, and feedback ratings, along with a division-level class performance comparison.

Renders a detailed institute development report for the parent portal, displaying infrastructure metrics, placement statistics, package trends, campus comparisons, and recent campus updates using progress bars, SVG charts, and gauge meters.
A collapsible panel for the parent portal that allows parents to schedule virtual meetings with teachers or HOD, submit feedback, and rate their experience.
Displays a comprehensive student growth report including subject grades, skill levels, achievements, career readiness, and a monthly performance trend chart for the parent insight portal.
frontend/src/components/tabs/ParentInsig: Top-level tab component for the Parent Insight Portal featuring a secure-portal header with a print button and sub-navigation across three sections: Student Growth, Faculty Transparency, and Institute Development.
frontend/src/components/tabs/SkillBasedT: Tab component displaying student skill profiles filterable by software/hardware type and search query, alongside a list of upcoming hackathons with tags and prize details.
frontend/src/components/tabs/SmartNotifi: Tab component combining a study calendar, live countdown timers for upcoming exams, assignment checklist, gamification badges, and a user-created goal tracker with progress bars.
frontend/src/components/tabs/StudentDash: Main student dashboard component that renders a tabbed navigation with six sub-sections (Academic Roadmaps, Exam Hub, Goals, Teams, Marketplace, Feedback), dynamically swapping the active sub-component based on selection.
frontend/src/components/tabs/Sustainable: A peer-to-peer marketplace UI for students to buy/rent academic items (hardware, books, dev boards, software), with category filtering and product cards showing ratings, seller info, and a contact button.
frontend/src/components/WelcomePage.tsx: Displays a full-screen hero welcome page for the NIRGRANTHA platform with feature highlights and a call-to-action button that invokes the `onEnter` callback to proceed to sign-in.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Provides a React authentication context that manages the current user role (student, teacher, institute, or parent) with login/logout functions and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and returns an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module indicating no backend queries are needed since all data is static or mocked.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines extensive CSS custom property tokens for multiple portal themes including parent, student, faculty, institute, and NIRGRANTHA palettes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that bootstraps React with TanStack Query, the InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), and extensive design token color mappings using OKLCH variables for multiple portal themes (Faculty Hub, IICC, Parent, etc.).
project_state.json: Project state document for NIRGRANTHA, an AI-powered EdTech platform for Indian engineering colleges, tracking architecture notes, existing features, known issues, and image requirements across 4 portals (Student, Teacher, Institute, Parent).
